subtitle.zh: 多智能体模拟与交易平台

description.zh: 结合前沿 AI 模型与区块链技术的多智能体模拟与交易平台。通过大语言模型驱动的 Agent 进行链上资产策略博弈，探索 Web3 生态的 AI 原生应用边界。
description.en: A multi-agent simulation and on-chain trading platform combining frontier LLMs with blockchain infrastructure. LLM-driven agents compete in asset strategy games, pushing the boundary of AI-native applications in the Web3 ecosystem.

subtitle.zh: 生命周期管理洞察报告

description.zh: 从商业运营视角对 Fate/Grand Order 养成系统进行系统性拆解，研究其生命周期管理策略、付费漏斗设计与用户留存机制，输出结构化行业洞察。
description.en: A systematic teardown of Fate/Grand Order's progression system from a business ops perspective — examining player lifecycle management, monetization funnel design, and retention mechanics to produce structured industry insights.

title.zh: 股票投资组合 LSTM AI 预测

description.zh: 基于 LSTM 神经网络构建多资产投资组合预测模型，集成技术面与基本面特征，在回测框架下验证策略有效性，产出可视化分析报告。
description.en: A multi-asset portfolio forecasting model built on LSTM neural networks, integrating technical and fundamental features. Strategy efficacy is validated in a backtesting framework with visualized analytical reports.

title.zh: 「Fate Only」大型 IP 线下活动企划
title.en: Fate Only — Large-Scale IP Offline Event

description.zh: 主导策划并落地以 Fate 系列 IP 为主题的大型线下活动，覆盖场地谈判、供应商管理、营销传播与现场执行，吸引千人规模参与，构建社群生态。
description.en: Led the planning and execution of a large-scale Fate IP offline event, covering venue negotiation, vendor management, marketing, and on-site operations — drawing 1,200+ attendees and building a lasting community ecosystem.
